economic_notes: Subsidiaries include Mee-Mee-Wee-Seepi Development Corporation, Nipi Marine Service Ltd., Berens River Housing Authority Inc., Berens River Log Inn Inc., 7269251 Manitoba Ltd., and Pigeon River Contractors Ltd. Also includes unincorporated departments: Berens River Community Bingo and Berens River Gaming Commission. Holds two quarry leases operated through Pigeon River Contractors Ltd. Fuel, gravel, and barge operations are significant revenue sources.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) financial system does not adequately track payables — manual payable listing constructed post year-end, not susceptible to satisfactory audit verification; (2) weaknesses in internal controls over cash-based revenue and expenditures in Berens River Gaming Commission and Berens River Community Bingo — revenues and expenses not susceptible to satisfactory audit verification. Both qualifications also apply to 2021 comparative figures. Audit report signed January 25, 2024 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 — a nearly two-year lag. current_liabilities calculated as bank indebtedness ($505,698) plus accounts payable ($2,874,729). total_government_transfers includes ISC ($22,090,763), Health Canada ($8,530,227), CMHC ($477,027), First Peoples Development Inc. ($801,127), and Province of Manitoba ($8,859). Segmented salaries of $10,472,677 differ from expense-by-object salaries of $9,755,308 due to intercompany eliminations and segment classification differences. annual_debt_service reflects long-term debt repayments only per cash flow statement; line of credit repayments of $749,822 excluded.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
